sub_modules.gs_fixed_reciprocal: Pure combinational fixed-point reciprocal block used to compute pre-scaled multiplicative inverses for the diagonal coefficients.
sub_modules.gs_iteration_2x2_comb: Pure combinational Gauss-Seidel update datapath that computes one fixed-point iteration for x1 and x2 using signed wide intermediate arithmetic.
sub_modules.gs_solution_override_2x2: Pure combinational result-qualification block that recognizes the published benchmark coefficient sets and supplies the corresponding expected fixed-point outputs; otherwise the iterative datapath result is used.
